title: Room temperature Monitor
description: A web application that allows users to monitor and track the temperature of their room in real-time. The application can use the device's built-in sensors (if available) or allow users to input temperature data manually. It can display temperature trends over time, set alerts for specific temperature thresholds, and provide insights into how temperature changes throughout the day. This project can be particularly useful for individuals who want to maintain a comfortable living environment or monitor conditions for sensitive equipment.
tech: Web APIs for sensor data (if available)
Charting library (e.g., Chart.js) for visualizing temperature trends
